subject: Job hunting
body:
Darling Jeffrey!
Linda Stone IM'd me and she was very opinionated about my life per usual!
:)

I was offered a financing job with Arab Real Estate Company (they're not
very creative when it comes to names). A Kuwaiti public company which bought
up a HUGE plot of land in Dubai.

Offering more money (currently $81,000 / year). I'm continuing my
interviewing process with Dubai Investment Group next week.

Haven't heard back from IGY.

My life in Dubai has to date been job hunting. I'm having tremendous
problems finding interesting people to socialize with. Finding appropriate
people is even worse. Then again, the standard of living is unsurpassed and
I'm pretty comfy here.

Much and best love,
-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
body_html:
Darling Jeffrey!
Linda Stone IM'd me and she was very opinionated about my life per usual! :) 
 
I was offered a financing job with Arab Real Estate Company (they're not very creative when it comes to names). A Kuwaiti public company which bought up a HUGE plot of land in Dubai. 
 
Offering more money (currently $81,000 / year). I'm continuing my interviewing process with Dubai Investment Group next week.
 
Haven't heard back from IGY.
 
My life in Dubai has to date been job hunting. I'm having tremendous problems finding interesting people to socialize with. Finding appropriate people is even worse. Then again, the standard of living is unsurpassed and I'm pretty comfy here.
 
Much and best love,

Cecilia Steen
